#dimatis #melodicdubstep #dubstep #chillstep #flstudio #music #musicproducer #electronic #edm #melodic #panama

If someone had told me 10 years ago (in 2013) when I started producing music that I would achieve things like this, I would never have believed it. Who knows what my goal was at 16 years old when I released my first songs in 2014. And since then I have tried to be consistent in releasing music.

I have the pleasure and luck of having been immersed in the community, meeting and working with great and talented people, and making friends through the years.

This would never be possible thanks to the people who listen to and support my music. Each one of you is very special to me and I would never have words to thank you for everything.

Every time I see people playing my music along with other big artists, some using my music on videos, and people who send me private messages telling me how much impact my music has on their lives, I just feel lucky wanting to cry, I stop to think, how is it possible that they listen to my music?

I hope to continue giving my best and count on all of you in the next and all the years to come 💖.

#dimatis #melodicdubstep #melodic #chillstep #dubstep #edm #electronic #panama #melodicbass #bass #futurebass #flstudio #music #musicproducer #spotifywrapped #spotify

Who wouldn't want to travel back or forward in time? I have the pleasure to bring you another song with Elvya (@elvyadulcimer) this time with a time traveler theme, get ready to be delighted with a chill-type beat using sparkly and enveloping sounds that we could probably hear during a time teleportation while everything stops around you 💫. I came up with the instrumental of this song as an idea of mine almost 3 years ago but the result never convinced me so I never released it until talking to Elvya I showed her the demo and she added that magic missing, Now it comes alive thanks to her amazing vocals as always 💜.

All my music will always be free to download in MP3 and copyright free, that's how I want it to be, but in this case I want to comment that I have a Bandcamp page where you can buy my music in lossless quality (WAV and FLAC) for only $1 each track, in case you want to use some of my tracks as reference for mixing and mastering, or for a dj set, or anything else, or just if you want to support my work ❤️ but if you really want one of my lossless files and can't pay for it, you're free to send a DM and I'll give it to you ✨

Thanks for supporting my music all these years to everyone who listens to my music 🙏🏼❤️ you can find the link in my bio

It was always a dream of mine to have an official remix release from a remix contest in my discography, my remix of Snowflake is my first remix that makes it to the official release in a contest and I'm so happy to take part in this remix album along with 15 other amazing producers! Thanks @nawnofficial for hosting this contest, you're an inspiration!

Listen to my remix and the other remixes on your preferred music platform, hope you like it 💫 the link is in my bio 💙

📢 WINNERS ANNOUNCEMENT

Okay, probably I just went crazy with the winner picks, I spent the last few days listening to all the 40 submissions, there were so many good remixes that I couldn't just pick only 5, so I ended up picking 17 winners. I couldn't resist including in the Official Release all the remixes I really enjoyed, all the good remixes deserve support and a place in it.💖.

It was so difficult to decide the 1st place among my top 3, the three sound very professional and deserved the 1st place but after thinking about it a lot, Pofinho is the winner to me, I don't know if you all will agree with me but Pofinho's remix is so emotional, it tells me a story and it's so perfect with the 3 drops and all the sounds.

❗ Important: If you did a remix and didn't make it to the winners, don't let this put you off or discourage you, I know how depressing it can be to not make it to the winners, so I want to spread good vibes and say thanks to you all, your remixes have a special meaning to me. Never give up and keep making music!

💎 Winners:
1. Pofinho (@pofinho14)
2. Max Reyem (@maxreyem)
3. BrillLion (@brilllion_official)
4. souKo (@soukomusic)
5. Lenik (@lenikofficial)
6. Midnight Sky (@midnightskyofficial)
7. KASIQUE (@kasiquemusic)

14. NAWN (@nawnofficial)
15. Senna's Revenge (@wtfs3nna)
16. Flarize (@flarizemusic)
17. Diemond (@diemondbeats)

📢 I'm very excited to announce my first-ever remix contest!

I believe "Call Out" has potential for remixes and I can't wait to hear what you can do with it ❤.

Submission deadline: April 8th, 2022.

🥇 Prizes: 1st, 2nd, and 3rd place will receive cash prizes on PayPal, and their remixes will be included in the official remixes EP release, 4th and 5th place will also be included in the official remixes EP release.

For stems and more info like details, how to participate, dates, prizes, rules, entries, please visit the contest website (find the link in my bio). Btw I coded the entire website on my own 😌.

Winners Announcement: April 15th, 2022.

If you want to help spread my first remix contest, share it in your story, it would help me a lot to reach more people or just tag a producer friend who would be interested in participating 💕.

Feel free to send a DM if you have questions about the contest! 💖

#remixcontest #remixcompetition #remixcontests #remix #music #edm #musicproducers #flstudio #ableton #electronic #electronicmusic #dubstep #melodicdubstep #dimatis

A year ago I did a remix for a remix competition by Beatcore, I had no place in the winners, I know that feeling of disappointment with yourself because I have participated in several contests that I didn't win an official remix placement but I know I've been making music for many years now and I can't let things like this affect me. I remember I didn't even want to listen to it again until a good friend (@pressure_draper) told me that it's a beautiful remix and that it would be nice to release it, and now I feel like it's such a great track, NEVER feel bad about your creations! So since I only used the vocals from the original I decided to release the instrumental on all platforms as self-release and the original remix will be on youtube, it will be out this Friday, March 4th 💙.

#melodicdubstep #dimatis #dubstep #chillstep #electronic #panama #edm #musicproducer #music #flstudio
